news.t: ARKK vs. SPRX: Battle of the Active Tech ETFs
SPRX: This Unknown ETF Returned Nearly 90% Last Year
How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23
SPEAR Invest Launches SPEAR Alpha ETF (SPRX), an Industrial Technology Fund

holdings.infoBox: SPRX is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Coherent stock at 8.63%, Arm Holdings at 8.21%, Astera Labs at 7.85%, KLA Corporation at 7.79%, and Cloudflare at 6.57%.

overview.description: The Spear Alpha ETF (SPRX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund actively invests in global thematic companies it believes will benefit from breakthrough innovations in the industrial and technology space. SPRX was launched on Aug 2, 2021 and is issued by Spear.

data.title: ARKK vs. SPRX: Battle of the Active Tech ETFs
data.text: Two active tech ETFs that invest in disruptive growth stocks, the ARK Innovation ETF (NYSEARCA:ARKK) and the less well-known Spear Alpha ETF (NASDAQ:SPRX), both racked up impressive gains last year.
